title: Marketplace Manager - Bombay Shaving Company - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Bombay Shaving Company - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bombay Shaving Company! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Coimbatore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bombay Shaving Company:
Bombay Shaving Company is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bombay Shaving Company!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
